items.$comment: A published entry is a submitted registry/plugins entry plus CI-computed fields. downloadCount and screenshotUrl exist ONLY here: build/aggregate.mjs injects them (from registry/stats.json and by resolving the cover image at the latest commit), and scripts/validate-entry.mjs rejects them in a submission.

downloadCount.description: Total release-asset downloads, injected by build/aggregate.mjs from registry/stats.json.

screenshotUrl.description: Store cover image, resolved at build time by build/aggregate.mjs at the latest version's commit: docs/screenshot.png if it exists there, else the first README image that resolves. Absent when nothing resolved (the TREK server then constructs its own docs/screenshot.png URL).
